candidate_rule: Keep health rows with case_id+memid present in ihs2_individ.dta; do not export raw IDs.
double_count_rule: One row per case_id+memid in sec_d; unresolved duplicate policy if future waves differ.
skip_exception_rule: Nonroster health rows remain excluded only as a candidate policy, not final acceptance.
remaining_blocker: Need formal exception policy for 6 nonroster health rows and 2 roster-only health absences.

candidate_rule: Recent illness/injury need equals d04==Yes among roster-matched health rows.
double_count_rule: One person-row counted once even if two illness problems/actions are listed.
skip_exception_rule: d07a/d07b values outside d04==Yes remain skip exceptions and are not included.
remaining_blocker: Need accepted rule for 6 d07a skip-leakage rows outside d04==Yes.

candidate_rule: Financial access failure candidate equals any d07a/d07b value labeled Did nothing, no money among acute-need rows.
double_count_rule: Use row-level any(d07a==2, d07b==2), so a person is counted once.
skip_exception_rule: Ignore d07a/d07b outside d04==Yes unless a final skip-repair rule is accepted.
remaining_blocker: Need final double-count and missing-action policy before access outcome promotion.

candidate_rule: Nonfinancial no-action context equals any d07a/d07b value labeled Did nothing, not serious among acute-need rows.
skip_exception_rule: Do not treat as financial access failure without no-money label.
remaining_blocker: Need final decision whether this remains context only or becomes nonfinancial access barrier.

candidate_rule: Core formal care equals government or private health facility in d07a/d07b among acute-need rows.
double_count_rule: Use row-level any(d07a/d07b in {government facility, private facility}).
skip_exception_rule: Exclude church/mission facility from core but include in sensitivity.
remaining_blocker: Need accepted provider grouping for church/mission facility, pharmacy, and traditional healer.

candidate_rule: Extended formal care adds church/mission facility to government/private facilities.
double_count_rule: Use row-level any(d07a/d07b in {government, private, church/mission facility}).
skip_exception_rule: Sensitivity only until provider grouping is accepted.

candidate_rule: Informal/self-care context includes medicine in stock, grocery medicine, traditional healer, and faith healer among acute-need rows.
double_count_rule: Use row-level any matching informal/self-care labels.
skip_exception_rule: Context/sensitivity only until provider grouping is accepted.

candidate_rule: Hospitalization cost-coping context equals d15==Yes and d17==Yes.
skip_exception_rule: d17 skip leakage outside d15==Yes is zero in current audit.
remaining_blocker: Need final decision whether coping is context, mechanism, or severity outcome.

candidate_rule: Traditional-healer cost-coping context equals d18==Yes and d20==Yes.
skip_exception_rule: d20 skip leakage outside d18==Yes is zero in current audit.
remaining_blocker: Need final decision whether traditional-healer care is access, informal care, or context only.

candidate_rule: Chronic need context equals d26==Yes among roster-matched health rows.
skip_exception_rule: Used as chronic-need context, not acute forgone-care denominator by default.
remaining_blocker: Need final decision whether chronic need enters double-failure denominator.

candidate_rule: Document skip exceptions without repairing raw values: d07a leakage outside d04==Yes remains excluded and flagged.
double_count_rule: No person-level outcome is created from skip-exception rows.
skip_exception_rule: d07a leakage is separate from nonroster rows and must be reported as an active blocker.
remaining_blocker: Need accepted skip-leakage exclusion/repair rule before health/access final verification.
